executive_summary: Latest updates from 2 sources covering the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Monitoring 2 key developments. AI analysis refreshing shortly.
execSummaryRich: Escalation: HIGH. Key developments: How Trump's regime has become captive to its own lies. Rubio says US expects to finish Iran war 'in next couple of weeks'. Situation remains active.

key_developments.headline: How Trump's regime has become captive to its own lies
key_developments.detail: In The Power of the Powerless , Vaclav Havel described a system in which lies are not incidental, but foundational. A system that does not merely tolerate falsehood, but requires it, reproduces it, lives within it: “Because the regime is captive to its own lies, it must falsify everything.” What Hav

key_developments.headline: Rubio says US expects to finish Iran war 'in next couple of weeks'
key_developments.detail: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio says the US expects to finish its operations in Iran "in the next couple of weeks". The objectives were being achieved and were ahead of schedule, he said at the end of a meeting in France of foreign ministers from the group of major Western economies, known the G7.
key_developments.fullAnalysis: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio says the US expects to finish its operations in Iran "in the next couple of weeks". The objectives were being achieved and were ahead of schedule, he said at the end of a meeting in France of foreign ministers from the group of major Western economies, known the G7.

terminology_explained.simple_explanation: Iran's elite Revolutionary Guard — controls missiles and drones.
Narrow waterway — 20% of world oil passes through it.

what_to_watch_next: Monitor live feeds for breaking developments.

india_impact.headline: India Monitors Gulf Conflict
india_impact.detail: India's energy security tied to Gulf stability.
india_impact.full_detail: India imports 85% of crude oil from Gulf. Strait of Hormuz disruption would immediately impact supply.

indiaSummary: India continues to monitor the US-Israel-Iran conflict closely given its significant dependence on Gulf energy imports and the large Indian diaspora. Oil price volatility directly impacts petrol prices for Indian consumers.
